_comment: Site-wide flags. zhPublished is a PER-PAGE map (keyed by i18nKey) gating each Simplified-Chinese /zh/ page independently. For a page whose flag is false (DRAFT): its /zh/ page is noindex, no hreflang is emitted on either side of the pair, the /zh/ url stays out of sitemap.xml, and no language toggle renders. For a page whose flag is true (PUBLISHED): its /zh/ page drops noindex, the EN+/zh/ pair carries reciprocal hreflang (en/zh-Hans/x-default), the /zh/ url is listed in sitemap.xml with per-pair xhtml:link alternates, and the navbar language toggle renders. index + competition are published (Phase 1d); workshop + contact ship as drafts (Phase 2b) — flip a flag to true to publish that page. Consumed by src/_data/eleventyComputed.js (zhNoindex/hreflangAlternates/localeToggle) and src/sitemap.njk.
